sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106053" key="tufla/gkistron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τυφλ-άγκιστρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n106053.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">blunt hook,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:6:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.6.6</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:18:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.18.8</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
